description: Reads the SSH config file and returns configured host aliases, hostnames, and ports as structured data.
Returns file permission mode, owner, and group for the specified path.
Performs a DNS lookup and returns resolved IP addresses.
Parses a database connection URI into components: host, port, database name, username.
Lists environment variables matching a given prefix or pattern.
Makes an HTTP GET request and returns status code, headers, and body.
Scans localhost ports in a given range and reports active listeners.
Parses a .env file and returns key-value pairs.
Returns SSH public key metadata: type, bit length, fingerprint, comment.
Decodes a JWT and returns the header and payload claims.
Retrieves TLS certificate chain details for a given hostname.
Validates a config file against a JSON Schema and lists errors.
Reads a Dockerfile and returns base image, ports, volumes, entrypoint.
Generates a random string for use as a password or API key.
Compares two directory trees by file presence, size, and modification time.
